name: Bug Report
about: Report a defect in the framework template itself
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description
A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Clone the repo
2. Configure `config.json` with...
3. Run `mvn test -Dtest=SmokeTestRunner`
4. Observe error

## Expected Behaviour
What should have happened.

## Actual Behaviour
What actually happened. Include stack trace or error message:

```
Paste stack trace here
```

## Environment
| Item        | Value              |
|-------------|--------------------|
| OS          | e.g. Windows 11    |
| Java version| e.g. 17.0.2        |
| Maven version| e.g. 3.9.2        |
| Browser     | e.g. Chrome 124    |
| Runner used | e.g. SmokeTestRunner |

## Screenshots / Logs
Attach screenshots, extent report, or log output if applicable.

## Additional Context
Any other information that might help diagnose the issue.
